description_long: This is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, each featuring a prominent insignia and equipped with pylons for external stores. The aircraft has two large turbofan engines mounted at the rear, with visible exhaust nozzles. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark, streamlined canopy. The surface of the airplane is finished in a matte gray color with subtle panel lines and military markings, giving it a stealthy appearance.
description: A gray, swept-wing military jet with twin vertical stabilizers, rear-mounted twin engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin engine exhausts, swept wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the low-mounted swept wings, cockpit canopy, and tail configuration.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing layout.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the wing and tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
